title: Junior Business Development Manager at Anarock Property Consultants

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Anarock Property Consultants
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Anarock Property Consultants in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Anarock Property Consultants:
Anarock Property Consultants is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Anarock Property Consultants!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
